Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class NaturalPersonFddCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.NaturalPersonFddCreate
public class NaturalPersonFddCreate extends Object
NaturalPersonFddCreate - Foreign Due Diligence for Legal Natural Persons required when a Legal Natural Person is the Primary Owner on a non-resident/non-citizen Account.
